# 1325.AI

> The agentic commerce protocol for community wealth — the largest verified Black-owned global business directory with 43,000+ listings, AI-powered discovery, loyalty rewards, and economic circulation infrastructure.

1325.AI (parent: Mansa Musa Marketplace) connects consumers with verified Black-owned businesses through an AI-powered platform. Our agentic ecosystem of 42 Agentic AI employees, led by Kayla, handles discovery, marketing, customer support, and operations for businesses on the network.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Discover the 1325.AI platform and verified Black-owned global business directory.
- [Directory](/directory): Search 43,000+ verified Black-owned businesses by category, location, and rating.
- [About](/about): Learn how 1325.AI builds economic infrastructure for community wealth circulation.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): The agentic commerce protocol, circulation rails, and loyalty rewards explained.
- [Sponsor](/sponsor): Corporate sponsorship and infrastructure investment opportunities.
- [Ambassador](/ambassador): Join the 1325 Ambassador Program — earn commissions growing the network.
- [Register](/register): List your business on the 1325.AI directory.
- [Login](/login): Sign in to your business or consumer account.
- [Jobs](/jobs): Open roles across the 1325.AI community.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about the platform, rewards, and verification.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service)
